---
title: "AD Microglia Processing GSE140510"
author: "Alexander Bergendorf"
date: "2026-04-07"
output: html_document
---


# Library Import
```{r}
library(Seurat)
#library(mixOmics)
library(tidyverse)
#library(orthogene)
library(dittoSeq)
library(openxlsx)
#library(PCAtools)
library(MASS)
library(glmnet)
library(pROC)

home_dir <- "/mnt/vstor/SOM_PATH_DKB50/members/axb1812/AD_Project_Microglia"
```


# Loading Mouse Data

```{r}
combined <- readRDS(file = paste0(home_dir, "/sc_mouse_objects/gse140510_microglia_pre.RData"))
```

```{r}
combined$phenotype <- ifelse(grepl("AD", combined$orig.ident), "AD", "C")
```




# Run PCA to isolate mouse Microglia

```{r}
DefaultAssay(combined) <- "RNA"
combined <- NormalizeData(combined)
combined <- FindVariableFeatures(combined, selection.method = "vst", nfeatures = 3000)
all.genes <- rownames(combined)
combined <- ScaleData(combined, features = all.genes)
combined <- RunPCA(combined, features = VariableFeatures(object = combined))
```


```{r}
p1 <- dittoDimPlot(combined, var = "orig.ident", reduction.use = "pca")
ggsave(filename= paste0(home_dir, "/figures/gse140510/gse140510_umap_init.png"), width = 9, height = 7) # name the file as an EPS
```

A lot of these principal components are separated by only a few cells... I think we need to cluster the cells again to get a better representation 

```{r}
combined <- FindNeighbors(combined, graph.name = "test", dims = 1:5)
combined <- FindClusters(combined, graph.name = "test", resolution = 0.5)
combined <- RunUMAP(combined, graph.name = "test", dims = 1:5)
```


```{r}
p1 <- dittoDimPlot(combined, var = "phenotype", reduction = "umap")
ggsave(filename= paste0(home_dir, "/figures/gse140510/gse140510_umap_microglia_.png"), width = 9, height = 7) # name the file as an EPS

p1 <- dittoDimPlot(combined, "seurat_clusters", do.label = TRUE, legend.show = FALSE, labels.size = 3) 
ggsave(filename= paste0(home_dir, "/figures/gse140510/gse140510_umap_init.png"), width = 9, height = 7) # name the file as an EPS
```





```{r}
# Visualization of some markers
marker_list <- c("Reln", "Satb2",
             "Mbp", "Mobp", "Mog", 
             "Matn4", "Pdgfra", 
             "Hes5", "Aldh1l1", 
             "Igfbp7",
             "Trem2", "P2ry12", "Tmem119", "Cx3cr1")

# Dot plot of all markers across clusters
p2 <- DotPlot(combined, features = marker_list, assay = "RNA") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1)) +
  scale_y_discrete(limits = rev)
ggsave(filename = paste0(home_dir, "/figures/gse140510/gse140510_dotplot_markers.png"),
       plot = p2, width = 9, height = 7)
```

```{r}
# Cluster 4 and 5 are non-microglial cels
combined <- subset(combined, subset = seurat_clusters %in% c(5, 6), invert = TRUE)
```

```{r}
# Save barcodes of good microglial cells for future use
good_microglia <- Cells(combined)
saveRDS(good_microglia, file = paste0(home_dir, "/sc_mouse_objects/gse140510_good_microglia_barcodes.RData"))
```



```{r}
saveRDS(combined,  paste0(home_dir, "/sc_mouse_objects/gse140510_microglia_final.RData"))
```

# Session Information

```{r}
sessionInfo()
```
